regional_cost_note: HVAC engineers in Invercargill typically charge $8,500–$20,000 for a residential ducted system and $150–$420/m² of conditioned space for commercial work. Southland rates are typically 10–15% below the national average, though remote work may attract travel charges. HVAC work must comply with NZ Building Code G4 and NZBC F7 — use a licensed installer.
